inputs.normalization_note: Reported FY2025 FCF/sh; 2026 capex guide $125–145B compresses near-term owner cash — Lawrence base keeps filing FCF₀

ai_overlay.status: partial — narrative cites AI capex guide; math uses FY2025 consolidated FCF

in_model.capex_2026_guide: $125–145B noted in Q1 2026 10-Q MD&A; not subtracted from Lawrence base

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Llama / open-source AI monetization separate from ads
Reality Labs path to breakeven timing (mgmt expects ~$19B 2026 RL op loss)
2026–2028 capex peak then FCF normalization schedule
AI inference cost curve (mgmt claims; verify transcript)
Custom silicon (MTIA) external sales if any

ai_inflection_bull.drivers: FoA ad AI yield, messaging monetization, capex normalization, RL losses bounded

segments.label: Family of Apps (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated FCF $46.1B + Reality Labs op loss $19.2B (Speedwell Meta pattern) [Assumption]
segments.notes: FY2025 FoA OI $102.5B; Q1 2026 FoA revenue +33% YoY

options.label: Reality Labs (VR/AR/metaverse)
options.notes: FY2025 op loss $19.2B; base zero terminal; mgmt guides ~$19B 2026 RL loss

corporate_drag.notes: AI capex step-up captured in Lawrence FCF₀ staleness flag, not double-counted here

bear.notes: Ad slowdown + capex without ROI; multiple compression

base.notes: FoA AI ad yield; capex moderates after 2027; RL losses flat

bull.notes: Messaging monetization + capex normalization + RL optionality

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO / AI capex not in FCF path?

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: Segment cash-flow build (reverse DCF)
paths.weight_why: Reverse DCF from segment filing data; cross-checks consolidated growth without replacing falsifier path.
weight_falsifiers: Segment sum PV tie-out fails vs consolidated OCF
Implied return moves >1pp when segment growth matches filing falsifier-adjusted exactly (double-count signal)
paths.hard_to_vary: partial: shares growth inputs with Tier A; weight kept below filing path

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Third-party confirms asset quality not in GAAP book; not full floor at spot price

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
